title: Too Hot, Not Hot Enough
description: TOO + adjective = excessively. Adjective + ENOUGH = sufficient. Two tiny words that change the whole meaning.
summary_pt_br: TOO (excessivo) vs ENOUGH (suficiente). Posição: TOO + adjetivo ('too hot'), adjetivo + ENOUGH ('hot enough'). Negativa: not hot enough = não quente o suficiente. TOO não é 'muito' — é 'demais'.

scenes.text_en:
'The coffee is TOO HOT,' said Bia.
'The coffee is not HOT ENOUGH,' said Zara.
'Rafa's tacos are TOO SPICY for Maya.'
'Joca isn't TALL ENOUGH to reach the shelf.'
TOO = excessive. ENOUGH = sufficient. Opposites.
scenes.text_pt:
'O café está QUENTE DEMAIS,' disse a Bia.
'O café não está QUENTE O SUFICIENTE,' disse a Zara.
'Os tacos do Rafa são APIMENTADOS DEMAIS pra Maya.'
'O Joca não é ALTO O SUFICIENTE pra alcançar a prateleira.'
TOO = demais. ENOUGH = suficiente. Opostos.

scenes.title: The position trap
scenes.body_en: TOO comes BEFORE the adjective: 'too hot'. ENOUGH comes AFTER the adjective: 'hot enough'. Not before. 'Enough hot' is WRONG. With nouns, ENOUGH goes before: 'enough money'. Never confuse TOO with VERY — 'too' is negative (excessive), 'very' is just intense.
scenes.body_pt: TOO antes do adjetivo. ENOUGH depois do adjetivo. Com substantivo, ENOUGH vem antes ('enough money'). TOO ≠ VERY — 'too' é DEMAIS (negativo), 'very' é muito.

exercise.question: Complete: 'The coffee is ___ ___ for me.' (excessively hot)
Complete: "The soup is too ___."
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "The soup is too salty."

exercise.question: Pick the best response. (ADJ + ENOUGH.)
options: Thank you. Also, my tea is not hot enough.
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "Thank you. Also, my tea is not hot enough."

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How is your food so far?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I am sorry. Let me get you another one.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Thank you. Also, my tea is not hot enough.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I will heat it up. Is the chair comfortable?
turns.pt: Vou esquentar. A cadeira está confortável?

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Let me move you to a bigger table.
turns.pt: Vou te colocar numa mesa maior.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: That would be wonderful. Thank you.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Yes, a little. It is hard to talk.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I will ask them to turn it down.

scenes.title: Listening story — Too Hot, Not Hot Enough
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Waiter and a student. TOO + adjective = excessively. Adjective + ENOUGH = sufficient. Two tiny words that change the whole meaning. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Waiter
paragraphs.en: How is your food so far?

paragraphs.speaker: Waiter
paragraphs.en: I am sorry. Let me get you another one.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Thank you. Also, my tea is not hot enough.

paragraphs.speaker: Waiter
paragraphs.en: I will heat it up. Is the chair comfortable?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Waiter. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "Too Hot, Not Hot Enough". TOO + adjective = excessively. Adjective + ENOUGH = sufficient. Two tiny words that change the whole meaning. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "Too Hot, Not Hot Enough". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'Too Hot, Not Hot Enough'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "Too Hot, Not Hot Enough".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
